data.title: 2025 Franklin County Festival of Trees in Chambersburg, PA with sparkling trees, holiday cheer, and beautifully bowed wreaths.
data.description: In Chambersburg, Pennsylvania, on December 3, 2025, the 2025 Franklin County Festival of Trees is in full swing, bringing festive joy with numerous beautifully decorated trees and wreaths. The winter wonderland event is covered in a light dusting of snow, enhancing the holiday spirit.
J.P. Morgan raises Persimmon’s target price to 1800p from 1520p.
JP Morgan Raises Siemens Energy Ag To Overweight From Neutral; Raises Target Price To EUR 160 From EUR 100

data.title: Stable prices for large diamonds, 1-carat diamonds down. Small diamonds prices sharply dropped. India sees larger decline than US. Tariffs impact market.
data.description: In November, larger diamond prices remained stable while 1-carat diamond market weakened. Smaller diamonds experienced a significant decline, following recent trends. Prices dropped more in India compared to the US due to tariff issues. The industry eagerly anticipated updates on resolving the 50% import duties on Indian goods by the US. The RapNet Diamond Index (RAPI™) reported these changes: Index November Year to Date Year on Year Jan. 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025.
China’s leader Xi describes talks with Macron as friendly and candid, livestream broadcast ongoing.
China’s Xi says both sides agree to strengthen political mutual trust, livestreamed.

data.title: IDE Technologies to build SWRO desalination plant in Mumbai, awarded EPC contract by BMC. Plant to be built in Manori with long-term operations agreement.
data.description: IDE Technologies, a prominent provider of desalination and water treatment solutions, has secured a significant Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) contract from the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) in Mumbai, India. The contract involves the development of a sizeable seawater reverse osmosis (SWRO) desalination plant in Manori. Additionally, IDE will also undertake the operation and maintenance of the plant under a long-term agreement. This project signifies a major milestone for IDE, solidifying its position in the industry and underlining its expertise in providing sustainable water solutions globally.

data.title: CT demands Robinhood, Crypto.com, Kalshi halt prediction markets, sent cease and desist letters for unlicensed sports betting.
data.description: The state of Connecticut has issued cease and desist letters to three platforms - Robinhood, Crypto.com, and Kalshi. Authorities allege that their event contracts constitute unlicensed sports betting. The letters were sent as part of regulatory measures, with the state cracking down on activities that are not appropriately licensed. This move comes amid heightened scrutiny of online platforms offering services related to financial trading, cryptocurrency, and event prediction markets. The platforms are now facing regulatory pressure in Connecticut, with the state taking action against what it perceives as violations of gambling laws. The companies have been instructed to cease operations related to event contracts until they obtain the necessary licensing to operate legally in the state. This development underscores the increasing regulatory challenges faced by online platforms in the financial and prediction markets.
